# Mexico Invest

> Independent research on Mexico property investment for US and Canadian buyers.

- Site: https://mexico-invest.com
- Contact: info@mexico-invest.com
- Markets: Riviera Maya, Los Cabos, Puerto Vallarta / Riviera Nayarit
- Focus: fideicomiso, net rental yields, due diligence, foreign buyer process
- Not a developer, not a listing portal

## Key guides (publishing)
- /guides/mexico-property-investment-guide/
- /guides/buy-property-mexico-foreigner/
- /guides/fideicomiso-mexico-explained/

## Full corpus
